claim_text: FriendlyFoto Studios will give a free family photo session this weekend for sharing a post.
quote: We are not offering free sessions in exchange for shares.

claim_text: Grandparents Day in the United States falls on the first Sunday after Labor Day.
quote: Grandparents Day is observed on the first Sunday after Labor Day.

claim_text: Drinking warm lemon water cures the common cold.
quote: Warm lemon water may soothe a sore throat, but it does not cure the common cold.
